query: intentional camera movement ICM abstract blurred photography painterly
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: ICM intentional camera movement, painterly abstract blur

response.objective_caption: An abstract image dominated by swirling fields of saturated red and yellow light, with warm orange tones blending at their boundary. The colors form soft gradients and indistinct organic shapes without discernible subjects or objects. No identifiable content is present.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract, heavily blurred photograph dominated by saturated red and yellow light bleeding into each other with soft, smeared gradients. The image lacks any discernible subject or fine detail, with edges dissolved into indistinct color fields, creating an abstract composition through extreme soft-focus and possible motion or camera movement during exposure.
